title: Russia Ukraine war: Troop build-up threatens Kostyantynivka, key to seizing Donbas
description: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.
content:
Russian troops have infiltrated the strategic city of Kostyantynivka in eastern Ukraine and are now trying to surround it.
The entire city is now effectively in a "grey zone", no longer controlled by anyone, Ukrainian soldiers have told the BBC.

title: Australia's largest ever cocaine bust made in underground bunker raid
description: Police seized 2.7 tonnes of cocaine worth an estimated A$816m after searching a property in western Sydney.
content:
Australian police have seized 2.7 tonnes of cocaine - the country's largest ever such bust - from an underground bunker system in western Sydney.
The drugs, with an estimated street value of A$816m (£433m, €500m), were found on Friday in compartments... [1834 chars]

title: Jeremy Clarkson says he’s in remission from prostate cancer: ‘The doctors caught it early’
description: Former Top Gear host urges others to get tested after revealing diagnosis in fifth season of Clarkson’s Farm
content:
Jeremy Clarkson says he is officially in remission from prostate cancer, less than a week after revealing he had an “aggressive” form of the disease in the final episodes of Clarkson’s Farm’s fifth season, which were filmed in 2025.

title: World Cup 2026: Cape Verde draw with Uruguay and near knockout qualification
description: Cape Verde's impressive World Cup continues with a draw against two-time winners Uruguay - and they will now be looking to make the last 32.
content:
Cape Verde's World Cup campaign will go down in history - and they are now on the cusp of going a step further.

title: Wyndham Clark battles hostile crowd to win US Open again: ‘It’s rare fans boo your shots’
description: By the time Wyndham Clark finally tapped in on the 18th green to secure his second US Open title in four years, the 32-year-old felt he had won more than a golf tournament
content:
Wyndham Clark spent much of Sunday afternoon hearing cheers for everyone but himself.
